channel.title: cms on Juanma Cordoba
channel.description: Recent content in cms on Juanma Cordoba

item.title: This blog uses Hugo
item.description: As title says, this blog uses Hugo. I was searching for a tool that enabled me to create static web page and upload it to Github as static page. I tried Jekyll but finally I chose Hugo.

item.title: Contact
item.description: You can contact me by writing an e-mail, through LinkedIn or Twitter.
